prompt: Hyper-realistic product photography of a neon yellow-green (chartreuse, #D4FF00) athletic performance t-shirt, photographed floating against a pure solid matte black background (#000000). The t-shirt is made of lightweight breathable dry-fit polyester fabric with a subtle satin sheen and fine mesh texture. Athletic cut, short sleeves, crew neck collar with the fabric showing slight translucency typical of performance sportswear. CENTER CHEST PRINT: the word 'IMMFREE' in bold condensed sans-serif black letters (similar to Oswald Bold or Bebas Neue), clean and modern, perfectly legible, printed in flat matte black ink. DIRECTLY BELOW the main logo: smaller text 'by Immunotec.' in a thin minimalist sans-serif font, also in matte black. The shirt is presented in a clean floating ghost mannequin / invisible mannequin style — no model, no hanger, as if suspended in mid-air with natural gravity drape. Subtle volumetric shadow beneath shirt giving it dimension. Dramatic studio lighting from above-left creates soft highlights on the fabric and gentle shadow on the right side, emphasizing the neon color and fabric texture. Ultra sharp focus on the front print, shallow depth of field fading slightly toward sleeves. Premium editorial product shot, e-commerce hero image quality, 8k detail, commercial advertising grade photography. The neon chartreuse color must GLOW against the pure black background creating high contrast and visual punch. No environment, no props, no people — only the t-shirt floating in infinite black space.
